title: StairDoors Extended
description: Allows doors to be placed on blocks such as stairs and modded vertical slabs
body:
# StairDoors Extended

Simple mod that allows doors to be placed on stairs, as well as other blocks such as vertical slabs from [AutoSlabs](https://modrinth.com/mod/autoslabs).

![StairDoors Extended Showcase](https://github.com/Andrew6rant/StairDoors/assets/57331134/fb8f5c45-c021-4806-ba22-48a063a5eec5)

Forked from https://gitlab.com/Setadokalo/stairdoors-fabric/ under the MIT License.
